name: Venison with Plum Sauce
keywords: game main dish sauces meats tex-mex
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the venison steaks by seasoning them with salt and pepper, if desired.
2. Preheat a skillet over medium-high heat until very hot.
3. Place the venison steaks in the hot skillet and cook for 4-5 minutes per side, or until browned and cooked to your preferred level of doneness.
4. Remove the venison from the skillet and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
